description_long: This apartment building is a rectangular, mid-rise structure with a flat roof and a modern urban facade. The front features a dark brick exterior with symmetrical window arrangements and a set of double doors at street level, suggesting a main entrance. The rear side is plain, with a concrete-like texture and no visible windows or doors. One side of the building displays a unique stone-patterned paneling with tall, narrow windows, adding visual interest and a contemporary touch. The other side is similarly plain, matching the rear with a concrete finish. The building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, brick, and glass, typical of urban residential architecture.
description: A modern, rectangular apartment building with a dark brick front, symmetrical windows, and a flat roof, featuring stone-patterned side paneling and a concrete rear.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a plain, concrete-textured wall with no windows or doors.
description_view_1: The front view displays a dark brick facade with symmetrical windows and a double-door entrance at the ground level.
description_view_2: The opposite rear or side view mirrors the plain, concrete-textured wall seen in view 0.
description_view_3: The side view features tall, narrow windows set in a stone-patterned panel, contrasting with the otherwise plain surfaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns on the front and side facades, with consistent spacing and alignment across floors.
